title: AI scientist, DNA editors, AI NPCs, new Qwen, open-source robots, new video editors: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers recent developments across multiple domains: Lance for data management, LiTo for efficient ML, Flash GRPO for language model training, L2P for learning paradigms, MegaASR for speech recognition, new robotics frameworks like LeRobot and CogOmniControl, video generation and editing tools including Stable Audio 3, and language models including Qwen 3.7 and live translation capabilities.
